val:
• Co-authored ViDeBERTa, a state-of-the-art Vietnamese pre-trained model, presented at EACL 2023.

  • Designed and implemented a chatbot using embedding search and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. With this solution, we achieve third prize at AIC Hackathon 2023

  • Researched eﬃcient transformer architectures to reduce the complexity of attention mechanisms.
